html:
Exclusive to:

“When the fuel reaches 0, its damage drops to 27.”

-

The Alarming Clock is a whip-like weapon exclusive to Wanda. It requires 3 Time Pieces, 4 Marble and 8 Nightmare Fuel to craft. It has increased range like the Tail o' Three Cats or Bull Kelp Stalk. While fueled, it has a base damage of 81.6 and counts as a Shadow Item, meaning middle-aged Wanda will do 97.92 damage and old Wanda will do 142.8 damage per hit. It does not break upon reaching 0% durability, instead becoming a non-shadow weapon with a base damage of 27.2 (meaning old Wanda does 13.6 damage per swing) until refueled. It has 96 uses, and can be refueled with Nightmare Fuel/Pure Horror to restore 25/50% of its durability (24/48 uses).

The Alarming Clock's attack speed is 15% slower than melee weapons, but has 2% more damage per second than the Dark Sword when used by Wanda. However, old Wanda's max damage per second is 11% less than mighty Wolfgang with a dark sword, although this is somewhat offset by the Alarming Clock's longer reach.

Tips

  • When positioned correctly, the Alarming Clock's longer range can effectively keep Wanda out of attacking range of many bosses.
    • Celestial Champion's third phase's melee attack has a trigger range slightly longer than the Alarming Clock's max range, but the melee attack range is shorter than Alarming Clock's, meaning that when aligned correctly player can attack Celestial Champion without getting hit by the melee attack.
  • If Wanda holds a fueled Alarming Clock while in the Lunar Grotto, Greater Gestalts will become hostile to her.
  • Like all of her watches, only Wanda can use the Alarming Clock.
  • Since the Alarming Clock counts as one of her clock items, it will stay in Wanda's inventory when she dies.

Trivia

  • When Wanda is in the different age phases, the Alarming Clock will have corresponding attacking animations. The Alarming Clock also has a shadow particles special effect while it has fuel.
  • Walter's examination quote for the Alarming Clock references his "hook-hand man" [1], in which the aforementioned hook-hand man lives in the woods, and "has a clock for every one of his victims".
    • Walter was the last character added before Wanda, so whether this was intentional foreshadowing to her addition or a complete coincidence is unclear.

Gallery

  • Alarming Clock Equipped
  • Concept art of the Alarming Clock from Rhymes With Play #282.
  • Alarming Clock use animation concept from Rhymes With Play #282.
  • Alarming Clock use effect animation concept from Rhymes With Play #282.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

“That looks like a bad time just waiting to happen.”
–Wilson
“That looks dangerous. I wanna try!”
–Willow
“Wolfgang would like to try!”
–Wolfgang
“Nothing could be as painful as my own memories.”
–Wendy
“COMBAT ADDON FOR THE FRAIL CLOCKMAKER”
–WX-78
“A handy bit of pocket-sized weaponry.”
–Wickerbottom
“I'd hate to be on the receivin' end of that thing.”
–Woodie
“That... looks like it would hurt.”
–Maxwell
“Aha! 'Tis not a time-teller, but a weapon in disguise!”
–Wigfrid
“We never knew clocks could be so dangerous.”
–Webber
“I'm starting to think Mme. Wanda has a bit of pent up aggression...”
–Warly
“Hurty Tick Tock”
–Wormwood
“Yeesh, that thing looks like it packs a wallop.”
–Winona
“Did I hear "one o'clock sharp", or "one sharp clock"? Hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Would like to see nasty Pigfolk hit with it!”
–Wurt
“Um, Ms. Wanda... do you make all these clocks out in the woods?”
–Walter
“If anything threatens me, why I'll clock them without a second thought!”
–Wanda
“When the fuel reaches 0, its damage drops to 27.”
-
The Alarming Clock is a whip-like weapon exclusive to Wanda. It requires 3 Time Pieces, 4 Marble and 8 Nightmare Fuel to craft. It has increased range like the Tail o' Three Cats or Bull Kelp Stalk. It has 96 uses, and can be refueled with Nightmare Fuel/Pure Horror to restore 25/50% of its durability (24/48 uses).
The Alarming Clock's attack speed is 15% slower than melee weapons, but has 2% more damage per second than the Dark Sword when used by Wanda. However, old Wanda's max damage per second is 11% less than mighty Wolfgang with a dark sword, although this is somewhat offset by the Alarming Clock's longer reach.
Tips[edit | edit source]
When positioned correctly, the Alarming Clock's longer range can effectively keep Wanda out of attacking range of many bosses.
Celestial Champion's third phase's melee attack has a trigger range slightly longer than the Alarming Clock's max range, but the melee attack range is shorter than Alarming Clock's, meaning that when aligned correctly player can attack Celestial Champion without getting hit by the melee attack.
If Wanda holds a fueled Alarming Clock while in the Lunar Grotto, Greater Gestalts will become hostile to her.
Like all of her watches, only Wanda can use the Alarming Clock.
Since the Alarming Clock counts as one of her clock items, it will stay in Wanda's inventory when she dies.

When Wanda is in the different age phases, the Alarming Clock will have corresponding attacking animations. The Alarming Clock also has a shadow particles special effect while it has fuel.
Walter's examination quote for the Alarming Clock references his "hook-hand man" [1], in which the aforementioned hook-hand man lives in the woods, and "has a clock for every one of his victims".
Walter was the last character added before Wanda, so whether this was intentional foreshadowing to her addition or a complete coincidence is unclear.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Đồng hồ Báo thức là một loại vũ khí giống như roi da dành riêng cho Wanda. Nó cần 3 Mảnh Thời Gian, 4 Đá Cẩm Thạch và 8 Nhiên Liệu Ác Mộng để chế tạo. Nó có phạm vi tăng lên như Tail o' Three Cats hoặc Bull Kelp Stalk. Khi được nạp nhiên liệu, nó có sát thương cơ bản là 81,6 và được tính là Vật phẩm bóng tối, nghĩa là Wanda trung niên sẽ gây 97,92 sát thương và Wanda già sẽ gây 142,8 sát thương mỗi đòn đánh. Nó không bị hỏng khi đạt độ bền 0%, thay vào đó trở thành vũ khí không bóng với lực sát thương cơ bản là 27,2 (có nghĩa là Wanda cũ gây 13,6 sát thương mỗi lần vung) cho đến khi được tiếp nhiên liệu. Nó có 96 công dụng và có thể được tiếp nhiên liệu bằng Nhiên liệu Ác mộng /…

It requires 3 [[Time Pieces]], 4 [[Marble]] and 8 [[Nightmare Fuel]] to craft. It has increased range like the [[Tail o' Three Cats]] or [[Bull Kelp Stalk]]. While fueled, it has a base damage of 81.6 and counts as a [[:Category:Shadow Item|Shadow Item]], meaning middle-aged Wanda will do 97.92 damage and old Wanda will do 142.8 damage per hit. It does not break upon reaching 0% durability, instead becoming a non-shadow weapon with a base damage of 27.2 (meaning old Wanda does 13.6 damage per swing) until refueled. It has 96 uses, and can be refueled with [[Nightmare Fuel]]/[[Pure Horror]] to restore 25/50% of its durability (24/48 uses). The Alarming Clock's attack speed is 15% slower than melee weapons, but has 2% more damage per second than the [[Dark Sword]] when used by Wanda. However, old Wanda's max damage per second is 11% less than mighty [[Wolfgang]] with a dark sword, although this is somewhat offset by the Alarming Clock's longer reach. == {{pic|32|Prototype}} Tips == * When positioned correctly, the Alarming Clock's longer range can effectively keep Wanda out of attacking range of many bosses. ** [[Celestial Champion|Celestial Champion's]] third phase's melee attack has a trigger range slightly longer than the Alarming Clock's max range, but the melee attack range is shorter than Alarming Clock's, meaning that when aligned correctly player can attack Celestial Champion without getting hit by the melee attack. * If Wanda holds a fueled Alarming Clock while in the [[Lunar Grotto]], [[Greater Gestalt]]s will become hostile to her. * Like all of her watches, only Wanda can use the Alarming Clock. * Since the Alarming Clock counts as one of her clock items, it will stay in Wanda's inventory when she dies. == {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * When Wanda is in the different age phases, the Alarming Clock will have corresponding attacking animations. The Alarming Clock also has a shadow particles special effect while it has fuel. * Walter's examination quote for the Alarming Clock references his "hook-hand man" [https://dontstarve.wiki.gg/wiki/Walter/Quotes/Don%27t_Starve_Together#Campfire_stories], in which the aforementioned hook-hand man lives in the woods, and "has a clock for every one of his victims". ** Walter was the last character added before Wanda, so whether this was intentional foreshadowing to her addition or a complete coincidence is unclear. == {{Pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery == Alarming_Clock_Equipped.png|Alarming Clock Equipped RWP263 Alarming Clock Concept Art.png|Concept art of the Alarming Clock from ''Rhymes With Play'' #282.
